_doc: Delegated PIM Manager GUI managers (engine/_shared/PIM-PortalAccess.ps1). Super-admins (manager-access role SuperAdmin) bypass ALL of this. A portal-admin is scoped by: tierMax (most-privileged tier they may touch; T0=0 most privileged, so tierMax=1 excludes T0), levelMax (L0=0 most privileged, levelMax=2 excludes L0+L1), services[] (entra/azure/workloads; '*'=all), scopes[] (azure scope prefixes, multi; empty=no azure restriction), capabilities[] (manage-direct, manage-indirect, assign, assign-admin, enable-consultants, invite-guest), managedAdmins[] (consultants this profile may assign-to / enable; '*'=any), managedGroupTags[] (optional explicit allowlist). identity = Windows DOMAIN\user or UPN. Copy to portal-admins.json (gitignored).

portalAdmins.displayName: Business IT dev (Azure under LZ scope)
Business dept owner (assignment + own consultants only)
